title: perezia ciliaris
intro: Perezia ciliaris, also known as beard grass, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as soothing digestive problems. Perezia ciliaris can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
